MODULE: cosmos.desktop.__init__
FILE: cosmos/desktop/__init__.py (25 lines)
CATEGORY: desktop

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Windows Desktop Interface.

A full-featured desktop application with:
- System tray integration
- Global hotkey (Ctrl+Shift+F)
- Chat interface
- Task management
- Memory browser
- Settings

Requires: PySide6, keyboard, darkdetect

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def launch_desktop()
